# Imogen Luciana

First mentioned: **3306-10-20**  
Last mentioned: **3306-11-20**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related


## Biography

Imogen Luciana served as Imperial Ambassador during one of the most delicate diplomatic crises of the 3300s. In October 3306, when hundreds of thousands of Marlinist refugees fled Imperial anti-terrorism lockdowns into Federation space, Luciana issued a formal demand for their extradition, insisting that the Federation was "harbouring potential criminals who are connected to the NMLA terrorists."

The Federation's refusal, led by Ambassador Jordan Rochester, transformed the refugee crisis into a full-blown inter-superpower dispute. Luciana later accused Federal authorities of resisting efforts to shut down NMLA bomb factories in LTT 1935, claims that Vice President Mitchell deflected by blaming Shadow President Winters for "welcoming terrorists." Luciana's tenure exemplified the sharp deterioration in Imperial-Federal relations during the NMLA emergency.
